case_title: ALAN K GEDDES VS. ONELINK CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER GEDDES, ALAN K HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALAN GEDDES' PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
